# Revenio

> AI-powered parallel-universe simulation platform. Forge a new self, choose a world, and live a story that was never yours.

Revenio lets you explore alternate lives through interactive AI-driven simulations across eight distinct worlds, plus Parallel Life — a documentary-style what-if mode built from your real biography.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Revenio and the parallel-universe experience.
- [Worlds](/worlds): The eight simulation worlds you can step into.
- [Play](/play): Start a simulation and choose your world.
- [Parallel Life](/parallel): Documentary-style what-if mode based on your real life.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Legend, and Immortal subscription tiers.
- [Hardware](/hardware): Companion hardware for immersive sessions.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access.
